title: Quantitative Reasoning, Estimation, and Problem Framing
description: Estimate attendance, supplies, time, and uncertainty for a neighborhood event before exact values are available. Learners cumulatively produce a transparent event-planning estimate notebook through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Interpret a number together with its unit, reference population, time window, and practical meaning.
Estimate magnitudes with benchmarks and defend an appropriate tolerance before calculating exactly.
Translate a practical question into known quantities, unknown quantities, constraints, and operations.
